name: Chunghwa Precision Test Tech. Co., Ltd.
summary: Chunghwa Precision Test Tech. Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the testing of semiconductor components in Taiwan, China, and internationally. It also produces printed circuit boards (PCB); and markets electronic products. The company offers interposers that convert signal wiring of probe PCB and allow the probe head to receive the signal; vertical probe cards for use in test interface before wafer dicing and IC packaging; and direct docking products for use in wafer testing. It also provides load board PCBs to test yield rate after dicing, mounting, welding, and wrapped with plastics, ceramics, and metals. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
